case_title: OSVALDO LOPEZ-RUBIO VS. JOSE RICARDO VALLEJO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LOPEZ-RUBIO, OSVALDO AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEJO, JOSE RICARDO DBA  CLUB 26 MIX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED AUG-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALLEJO, JOSE RICARDO DBA  CLUB 26 MIX

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---BLANCA VALENCIA. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM MAYOG; SAIA HALATO; JAMEEIKA FORD AND FEROOZ NAMGEYALY. NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ-RUBIO, OSVALDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALLEJO, JOSE RICARDO DBA  CLUB 26 MIX DEFENDANTS WAIVE NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S INCREASE IN THE AMOUNT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO $1,676.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
